name: Blue Dream
description: A sativa-dominant hybrid known for balanced full-body relaxation with gentle cerebral invigoration.

name: OG Kush
description: The backbone of West Coast cannabis, OG Kush delivers a heavy, euphoric body high with a complex earthy-pine aroma.

name: Girl Scout Cookies
description: A potent hybrid with a sweet, earthy aroma and powerful full-body effects that earned it legendary status.

name: Granddaddy Purple
description: A classic indica with stunning purple buds that delivers deep body relaxation and sweet grape flavors.

name: Sour Diesel
description: A legendary sativa with a pungent diesel aroma that delivers an invigorating cerebral high ideal for daytime use.

name: Jack Herer
description: Named after the cannabis activist, this award-winning sativa delivers a clear-headed, creative, and blissful high.

name: Green Crack
description: Despite its intense name, Green Crack is a sharp sativa that delivers an invigorating mental buzz perfect for daytime.

name: Northern Lights
description: One of the most famous indica strains, Northern Lights delivers a fast-acting body stone with dreamy euphoria.

name: White Widow
description: A Dutch coffeeshop classic, White Widow delivers a potent burst of euphoria and energy with a resinous appearance.

name: Pineapple Express
description: A buzzy, long-lasting high that combines body relaxation with active, creative mental stimulation.

name: Gelato
description: A dessert-flavored hybrid with beautiful purple and orange buds, delivering a balanced euphoric and relaxing experience.

name: Wedding Cake
description: A potent indica-leaning hybrid with rich vanilla and tangy aromas, offering deep relaxation with euphoric uplift.

name: Gorilla Glue #4
genetics: Chem Sister × Sour Dubb × Chocolate Diesel
description: An extremely potent hybrid that glues you to the couch with heavy-handed euphoria and full-body relaxation.

name: Zkittlez
description: A candy-flavored indica with a fruit-forward terpene profile that delivers calming, mellow effects.

name: Purple Punch
description: Like a glass of grape Kool-Aid, Purple Punch delivers sweet berry flavors with a one-two combo of head and body euphoria.

name: Runtz
description: Named after the candy, Runtz delivers a creamy smoke with a fruit-forward profile and long-lasting euphoric effects.

name: MAC 1
description: Miracle Alien Cookies delivers a potent yet balanced high with a complex citrus and diesel flavor profile.

name: Ice Cream Cake
description: A creamy, dessert-flavored indica that melts away stress and pain with a sedating, full-body high.

name: Durban Poison
description: A pure South African sativa landrace delivering an energetic, uplifting buzz ideal for staying productive throughout the day.

name: AK-47
description: Despite its aggressive name, AK-47 delivers a mellow, steady cerebral buzz ideal for social settings.

name: Trainwreck
description: A mind-bending hybrid that hits fast with a rush of euphoria followed by full-body relaxation.

name: Bubba Kush
description: A heavy indica delivering deep tranquility with rich coffee and chocolate flavors.

name: Skywalker OG
description: A potent indica that delivers out-of-this-world relaxation with earthy, spicy notes.

name: Lemon Haze
description: A zesty sativa delivering a sharp citrus flavor and an energetic, creative buzz.

name: Super Silver Haze
description: A three-time Cannabis Cup winner delivering an energetic, long-lasting cerebral high.

name: Amnesia Haze
description: A hazy sativa with complex earthy-citrus flavors that delivers an energizing, psychedelic-like cerebral high.

name: Strawberry Cough
description: Known for its sweet strawberry flavor and a cough-inducing expansion, this sativa delivers uplifting effects perfect for social anxiety.

name: Cereal Milk
description: A designer hybrid that tastes like the milk left in your cereal bowl, with balanced euphoria and relaxation.

name: Gary Payton
description: Named after the NBA Hall of Famer, this premium hybrid delivers a potent, energizing high with complex flavors.

name: London Pound Cake
description: A heavy-hitting indica with a complex sweet-berry cake flavor and deeply sedating effects.

name: Biscotti
description: An Italian cookie-inspired hybrid with diesel undertones and a well-balanced euphoric effect.

name: Do-Si-Dos
genetics: Girl Scout Cookies × Face Off OG
description: A potent indica-dominant hybrid with a sweet, earthy flavor that delivers heavy body relaxation.

name: Mimosa
description: A citrus-forward sativa-dominant hybrid perfect for weekend brunches with its uplifting, social effects.

name: Tangie
description: A remake of Tangerine Dream delivering an exceptionally citrusy flavor with uplifting, creative effects.

name: Chemdawg
description: The legendary parent of OG Kush and Sour Diesel, Chemdawg delivers a potent cerebral high with its signature diesel funk.

name: Headband
description: Named for the slight pressure around the crown of the head, this hybrid delivers smooth, long-lasting effects.

name: Banana Kush
description: A tropical indica delivering mellow relaxation with a distinct banana cream flavor.

name: King Louis XIII
description: A royal indica delivering a powerful, sedating body high with piney, earthy flavors.

name: Hindu Kush
description: A pure indica landrace from the mountains between Pakistan and Afghanistan, delivering a subtle, calming body high.

name: Afghan Kush
description: An ancient landrace from the Hindu Kush mountains, producing heavy resin and deep sedation.

name: Maui Wowie
description: A classic Hawaiian sativa that delivers a tropical-flavored high with stress-relieving energy.

name: Acapulco Gold
description: A legendary Mexican sativa known as one of the best strains ever created, with golden calyxes and an energizing high.

name: Lamb's Bread
description: Bob Marley's reported favorite strain, this Jamaican sativa delivers an introspective, creative high.

name: Tropicana Cookies
description: A citrus-dominant hybrid with purple buds and orange hairs, delivering uplifting, creative effects.

name: Sundae Driver
description: A balanced hybrid with a smooth, creamy flavor and equal parts mental and physical relaxation.

name: Animal Mints
description: A potent hybrid with frosty buds and a minty-earthy flavor that delivers heavy relaxation.

name: Apple Fritter
description: A true powerhouse hybrid with apple pastry flavors that delivers a potent, balanced high.

name: Slurricane
description: A fruity indica combining two heavy hitters for a sweet, berry-forward experience with deep sedation.

name: Jealousy
description: A trendy hybrid with a gassy, sweet aroma and a creamy smoke delivering balanced cerebral and physical effects.

name: Grease Monkey
description: A pungent hybrid mixing diesel fuel with sweet vanilla, delivering heavy relaxation and euphoria.

name: Sherbert
description: A fruity indica-dominant hybrid with a creamy, dessert-like smoke and full-body relaxation.

name: Sunset Sherbert
description: A colorful hybrid with a sweet sherbet flavor and a heady, stress-relieving high.

name: Purple Haze
description: Made famous by Jimi Hendrix, this classic sativa delivers a dreamy, creative cerebral high with berry notes.

name: Blue Cheese
description: A savory-sweet indica combining blueberry sweetness with funky cheese aromas for a relaxing body high.

name: LA Confidential
description: A California classic indica with dense, purple-tinged buds and a smooth, piney flavor that delivers fast relaxation.

name: Master Kush
description: A Dutch indica known for its sharpness and full-body relaxation without the overwhelming cerebral effects.

name: Bruce Banner
description: Named after the Hulk's alter ego, this potent hybrid delivers a powerful euphoric rush followed by full-body relaxation.

name: Cherry Pie
description: A fruity hybrid with dense, orange-haired buds delivering a balanced body/mind high with cherry flavors.

name: Tahoe OG
description: A potent indica phenotype of OG Kush with faster onset and stronger sedation effects.

name: Fire OG
description: Known as one of the strongest OG strains available, Fire OG delivers long-lasting effects with frosty, red-haired buds.

name: Kosher Kush
description: A three-time High Times Cannabis Cup winner delivering a deeply sedating, all-body high.

name: SFV OG
description: A potent OG Kush phenotype from San Fernando Valley with a piney flavor and balanced effects.

name: Purple Urkle
description: A deeply purple indica with sweet grape flavors that delivers a cozy, sedating body high.

name: Blackberry Kush
description: A jet-black indica with dark purple buds delivering a heavy, sedating body high with sweet berry flavors.

name: Mango Kush
description: A tropical hybrid with an unmistakable mango aroma and a gentle, uplifting body high.

name: Platinum OG
description: A heavy indica with a triple OG lineage and beautiful silver-frosted buds that delivers deep, sedating effects.

name: Lava Cake
description: A chocolatey indica with a rich, dessert-like flavor and deeply relaxing physical effects.

name: Georgia Pie
description: A dessert hybrid with a sweet peach pie flavor profile and a balanced, mood-lifting high.

name: Jet Fuel
description: A fuel-forward hybrid delivering an energizing, rocket-powered rush of cerebral energy.

name: Papaya
description: A fruity indica with a tropical papaya flavor that delivers a creeping, full-body sedative high.

name: Guava
description: A tropical hybrid delivering a balanced, fruity experience with creative stimulation and body relaxation.

name: Cake Crasher
description: A double-wedding hybrid with rich vanilla cake flavors and a potent, balanced euphoric high.

name: Birthday Cake
description: A sweet, dessert-flavored hybrid delivering a creamy vanilla experience with soothing body effects.

name: Permanent Marker
description: A hot new hybrid with pungent marker-like aromas and an extremely potent, long-lasting cerebral high.

name: RS-11
description: A trendy hybrid with a fruity-gassy flavor profile and potent, balanced effects.

name: Blueberry Muffin
description: Smells exactly like fresh-baked blueberry muffins, delivering a sweet, sedating indica experience.

name: Grape Ape
description: A dense, grape-flavored indica with purple buds and powerful body-numbing effects.

name: Thin Mint GSC
description: A premium phenotype of GSC with a distinctive minty-sweet flavor and powerful, balanced effects.

name: Motor Breath
description: A pungent, diesel-heavy indica delivering a powerful sedative high that hits hard and fast.

name: White Runtz
description: A premium phenotype of Runtz with even frostier buds and a creamy, sweet candy flavor.

name: Larry OG
description: An OG hybrid with balanced cerebral and body effects, delivering smooth lemony flavors.

name: Critical Mass
description: A high-CBD indica known for massive yields and balanced THC:CBD effects ideal for medical users.

name: ACDC
description: A high-CBD hybrid with a 20:1 CBD:THC ratio, delivering clear-headed therapeutic relief without intoxication.

name: Harlequin
description: A CBD-rich sativa with a reliable 5:2 CBD:THC ratio, ideal for pain relief without sedation or intoxication.

name: Charlotte's Web
description: The strain that launched the CBD movement, developed for pediatric epilepsy with virtually no THC.

name: Cannatonic
description: A balanced CBD:THC hybrid delivering mellow relaxation and mental clarity for therapeutic use.

name: Ringo's Gift
description: Named after CBD pioneer Lawrence Ringo, this high-CBD strain delivers therapeutic relief with minimal psychoactivity.

name: Panama Red
description: A legendary 1960s sativa landrace delivering a mellow, dreamy, and creative experience.

name: Rainbow Belts
description: A candy-flavored hybrid with rainbow-colored buds and a balanced, mood-lifting high.

name: Sour Banana Sherbet
description: A funky hybrid combining sour diesel with sweet banana for a complex, mood-lifting experience.
